name: Optimize scred detector/redactor for speed, throughput, and correctness

description: Baseline: Fixed streaming bug in run_redacting_stream. Secrets correctly redacted with character preservation. Throughput 21.72 MB/s on 662KB.

asi.hypothesis: Fixed run_redacting_stream to actually loop instead of exiting after first 64KB chunk
asi.bug_fixed: run_redacting_stream was limited to single shot read; broke large file support
asi.improvement: Now properly streams all input chunks in loop
